headline: The Bull Case For Wells Fargo (WFC) Could Change Following Fed Stress Test And Dividend Hike Plan
summary: Earlier this week, Wells Fargo & Company cleared the Federal Reserve’s 2026 stress test with its stress capital buffer unchanged at 2.5% and stated it expects to lift its third-quarter 2026 common dividend by 11% to US$0.50 per share, pending board approval in July. This combination of a clean bill of health from regulators and a planned cash return increase underscores Wells Fargo’s current capital strength and confidence in its balance sheet resilience. We’ll now examine how Wells Fargo’s...
